name: plan-baseline-cand2
description: item 20.2 reference arm (ii) — the SHIPPING config: bare default + the item-19 adopted cand2 terse rules via rules_append (APPEND -> AGENTS.md, never a system_prompt REPLACE — item 18 proved replace suppresses tool use on this 4B). Ported verbatim from gepa-t3-d-cand2port.json / gepa-cand2.json. This is the base ALL topology arms (a/b/c) sit on, so the only lever that varies across arms is the orchestration SHAPE, not the rules text. bare->cand2 isolates cand2's contribution; cand2->planning isolates planning's marginal effect. Text lever only; serving stays on the frozen local Gemma.
rules_append:
# Local Gemma coding-agent rules

- To find code: `grep` for it first to get its line number N.
- Then `read` that file with `offset = N` and `limit = 8`. Read AT line N.
- Never read a whole file; never read above the matched line.
